headlines.title: AI Companies Shatter Fund-Raising Records with $297B in Q1 2026
headlines.summary: OpenAI, Anthropic, Waymo and other AI companies raised $297 billion in funding in the first three months of 2026, marking unprecedented investment in AI infrastructure and frontier labs.

headlines.title: Google Launches Gemma 4: Open-Source Models That Run on Single H100 GPU
headlines.summary: Google released Gemma 4 featuring four open-source AI models capable of running entirely on a single 80GB Nvidia H100 GPU while delivering benchmark performance comparable to models 20 times their size.

headlines.title: Claude Mythos Leaked: Anthropic's Advanced Model Won't Be Publicly Released
headlines.summary: Anthropic's leaked model 'Claude Mythos' represents a step-change in capabilities but will NOT be publicly released due to cybersecurity risks, sparking industry debate.

headlines.title: AI Breakthrough Cuts Energy Use by 100x While Boosting Accuracy
headlines.summary: Tufts University researchers published breakthrough neuro-symbolic AI research that reduces energy consumption by 100x while improving accuracy, published in AIP Advances.

headlines.title: USGS Unveils AI That Predicts Drought 90 Days in Advance
headlines.summary: The United States Geological Survey unveiled breakthrough AI technology capable of predicting drought conditions with unprecedented accuracy up to 90 days in advance.

headlines.title: White House Releases National Policy Framework for AI
headlines.summary: The White House announced a new National Policy Framework for Artificial Intelligence, while states like Colorado and California continue advancing their own AI regulations.

headlines.title: Google Introduces TurboQuant at ICLR 2026
headlines.summary: Google's research team introduced TurboQuant, an algorithm addressing memory overhead in vector quantization, representing significant advancement in model efficiency.

headlines.title: Shield AI Raises Funding for Aechelon Technology Acquisition
headlines.summary: Shield AI raised significant funding to acquire Aechelon Technology and develop next-generation X-BAT jet fighter drone, projecting $540M+ in 2026 revenue.

headlines.title: Apple Announces AI-Powered Siri Reimagined for iOS 26.4
headlines.summary: Apple officially announced a completely reimagined, AI-powered version of Siri set to launch alongside iOS 26.4, powered by Gemini integration.

headlines.title: NVIDIA Showcases Physical AI Research for Robotics Week
headlines.summary: NVIDIA highlighted latest physical AI research and breakthroughs for National Robotics Week, showcasing AI-powered agricultural rovers for sustainable farming.

top_story.title: AI Companies Shatter Fund-Raising Records with $297B in Q1 2026
top_story.summary: The first quarter of 2026 was unlike any other for venture investment in AI. OpenAI, Anthropic, Waymo and other artificial intelligence companies hauled in $297 billion in funding, representing more than 3x the total raised in the prior quarter. North American companies alone secured $252.6 billion. This unprecedented spending is driven by massive investments in AI compute and frontier labs. Agentic AI companies specifically raised $2.66B across 44 rounds. Deloitte estimates $100 billion in AI-related M&A deals for 2026 alone.
